name: meta-prompt-skills
description: A flat collection of standalone meta-prompt skills, each a cleaned port of a battle-tested community prompt (plus an original prompt-improver). Ships humanizer (strip AI tells from writing), video-distill (turn a video into layered structured notes), sota-scan (benchmark a project against top peers — every gap names a real project), session-mine (mine recent transcripts for recurring corrections and propose rules/skills), clarify-deep (gather context, then ask few deep blind-spot clarifying questions), book-to-skill (turn a non-fiction book's method into one or two installable skills), and prompt-improver (improve an existing prompt/skill in auto or interactive mode). No agents, no shared docs — each skill stands alone, picks its own mode where relevant, and auto-routes on its own triggers.
